fields.description: The current branch has some changes to the Text writable which allow it to manually set the backing array, capacity, etc. Rather than exposing these internals, we should use the newly-committed facility from HADOOP-10855 to implement this.
fields.summary: native-task: revert changes which expose Text internals

comments.body: [~mauzhang], [~clockfly], [~decster], does this patch look good to you?
Hi Todd, isn't the class named TextSerializer or have I missed anything?

Oh, woops... i had this patch against another one which moved all the Hadoop writables to be inner classes of something called WritableSerializers to better group them together. Let me post that one first. Sorry!
Actually, just rebased the patch onto the tip of branch instead. Hopefully this one will apply properly for you, Manu.
looks good and passed kv test for Text at my side. +1
